title.zh: 微信小程序逆向 III - KillWxapkg 自动化工具链
title.en: WeChat MiniApp Reverse III - KillWxapkg Automated Toolchain

description.zh: 介绍 2026 年主流自动化逆向工具链，重点推荐 KillWxapkg 工具的完整使用流程。
description.en: Introduce mainstream 2026 automated reverse engineering toolchains, focusing on KillWxapkg tool usage.

content.zh: 主流工具对比：KillWxapkg 支持自动化扫描、解密、解包，内置通用 Hook。
content.en: Mainstream tools comparison: KillWxapkg supports automated scanning, decryption, unpacking, built-in universal Hook.

codeBlocks.code:
git clone https://github.com/Ackites/KillWxapkg
pip install -r requirements.txt
python main.py

content.zh: 常用命令：scan 扫描、unpack 解包、hook 提取密钥。
content.en: Common commands: scan, unpack, hook to extract keys.

codeBlocks.code:
python main.py scan
python main.py unpack --name "目标小程序"
python main.py hook --name "目标小程序"

content.zh: Hook 日志输出加密密钥和明文，完成自动化分析。
content.en: Hook logs output encryption keys and plaintext, completing automated analysis.
